title: Nexus Dashboard
description: A real-time analytics platform for SaaS metrics. Features live WebSocket data, drag-and-drop widgets, and AI-powered insights.

title: Folio CMS
description: Headless CMS with a visual block editor, multi-tenant support, and GraphQL API. Used by 200+ content creators.

title: Pulse API
description: Open-source REST framework with auto-generated docs, rate limiting, and JWT auth. 2k+ GitHub stars.

title: Stride Mobile
description: Cross-platform fitness tracker with ML-based form analysis, social challenges, and offline sync.

title: Ether Commerce
description: Headless e-commerce storefront with edge rendering, instant search, and A/B testing built-in.

title: DevLog CLI
description: Terminal tool to track dev time, auto-generate changelogs from commits, and sync with JIRA/Linear.
